_comment: STATIC HOLDINGS — your share counts (and optional avg cost). The script injects these into column F (qty) and H (avg) for matching tickers, overriding whatever Claude guessed. UPDATE THIS FILE whenever you buy or sell. 'qty' = number of shares (for IDX stocks that would be lots*100, but those come from the broker screenshot so they're omitted here). 'avg' = average cost basis in the SAME currency as the price column (USD for ETFs); set to null or omit if you don't track it — the I/J change formulas just won't be meaningful.
